Okay i need to create a new proposal,  heres the problem. upon you running gateway restart - there is a message thats sent when it restarts that acknowledges the restart "hot restart" is what the system calls it - but the problem is, we never actually get the message. theres 2 things about this.

1) if im on the web ui and call for a gateway restart within a chat session, when it comes back online - that message should appear in the same chat session! 

2) if im on telegram calling for a gateway restart, same thing! i should get the restart message on telegram

read the self.md - and also - update your memory to always read self.md whenever you need to create a proposal that has to do with src code edits

Perfect — I read `SELF.md`, confirmed the relevant architecture, and I can draft this proposal exactly as requested.

I’ll include fixes for both behaviors:

1) **Web UI restart continuity**: hot-restart confirmation must post back into the **same chat session** that initiated `gateway_restart`.  
2) **Telegram restart continuity**: hot-restart confirmation must be delivered back to **Telegram** when restart was initiated there.

I’ll also add the memory update you requested: that when creating src-edit proposals, I should always read `SELF.md` first.

If you want, I’ll now generate and submit the full `write_proposal` (with exact required sections and affected source files).
great lets go ahead and do all of that yes

Done — I’ve saved your preference to memory:

- **When creating a proposal involving `src/` code edits, always read `SELF.md` first.**

I’m ready to submit the actual proposal now, but I need one quick confirmation from you before I call `write_proposal`:

- **Should I keep this scoped strictly to hot-restart message delivery routing only** (Web UI same session + Telegram delivery),  
or
- **also include defensive retry/queueing** so the restart ack is persisted and delivered even if transport reconnect is slightly delayed after boot?
dont worry about anything else other than the message stuff - it all works perfectly right now we just need to fix the hot restart message to actually reach me/the user

Excellent — proposal is submitted and pending approval:

- **ID:** `prop_1774219665090_83703a`  
- **Title:** Fix hot-restart acknowledgment delivery to initiating Web UI session and Telegram channel  
- **Scope:** strictly message-delivery routing only (no restart-mechanics changes)

Approve it in the Proposals panel, and I’ll execute it right away.
